# Demographic Shifts & Socioeconomic Factors {#sec-demographics}

<!-- Purpose: demographic shifts and socioeconomic context for housing demand (PLAN.md §7 Ch 2). -->

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
source("_common.R")
```

*Figures, tables, and findings are built in Session 8 (PLAN.md §7, §9).*
